name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 9 Aug 2023
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we launched the enhanced UI for segment details."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Redesigned Segment Details UI ","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The segment details UI has been redesigned to enhance both usability and look and feel. To learn about segments including the new enhancement details, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Introduction-to-Segments","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Introduction to Segments","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the "},{"text":"Email Segments","bold":true},{"text":" page, (In Navigation > AUDIENCE > Segments), click the segment name to go to its details view. You’ll notice a significant upgrade to how information is displayed on the UI. The segment rules are now visually presented in a way that’s more readable and comprehensible."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SegmentOverview.0685g00000G89CMAAZ.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SegmentOverview.0685g00000G89CMAAZ.jpg","name":"Segment Overview","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2166,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A Timeline feature has been introduced enabling you to see all the Email Campaigns, Journeys, and Data Journeys in which the segment is used."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SegmentTimeline.0685g00000G89IGAAZ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SegmentTimeline.0685g00000G89IGAAZ.png","name":"Segment - Timeline","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":996,"width":1438}}]}]
